# OctoAcme Process Templates

This folder contains reusable templates and checklists that support the OctoAcme project management framework. Templates are organized by lifecycle phase and the role that owns them.

---

## Templates

| Template | Description | Owner |
|---|---|---|
| [Requirements Checklist](requirements-checklist.md) | Validates that requirements are complete, testable, and ready for development | Business Analyst |
| [QA / Test Plan Template](qa-test-plan-template.md) | Documents the test strategy, scope, test cases, and sign-off criteria for a project or feature | QA Lead |
| [Release Readiness Checklist](release-readiness-checklist.md) | Confirms all quality, documentation, and deployment preparation gates are met before a release | Release Manager |
| [Stakeholder Review Checklist](stakeholder-review-checklist.md) | Prepares for and documents structured phase-gate reviews with project stakeholders | Project Manager |
| [Handoff Checklist](handoff-checklist.md) | Ensures clean, accountable handoffs between phases and roles (Requirements→Dev→QA→Release→Stakeholders) | Role-to-Role |

---

## How to Use These Templates

1. Copy the relevant template into your project's documentation folder or issue/PR description.
2. Fill in the fields and check off items as they are completed.
3. Include the completed checklist in the relevant PR, issue, or project wiki for traceability.
4. Tag the responsible role (as listed above) to review and sign off before the handoff.

---

**Reference:** [Roles & Personas](../octoacme-roles-and-personas.md) | [Process Docs Index](../README.md)
